source.description: Page the image came from — original author/source attribution

image.description: Primary image: a bare filename, or an object carrying source/credit attribution (preferred for new images)

images.description: Array of images: bare filenames, or objects carrying source/credit attribution (preferred for new images)

datasheet_mirror.description: Repo-managed copy of the datasheet PDF on Cloudflare R2. Written by CI (scripts/mirror-datasheets.ts) - do not edit by hand. The original author/source URL stays in datasheet.url.

url.description: Public R2 URL of the mirrored PDF

source.description: datasheet.url at fetch time; a changed source triggers re-mirroring

related.description: Related products (replacement, predecessor, variant, accessory, etc.). For a discontinued product, a `replacement` item points at its successor. Declare each relationship on one side only; detail pages derive the reverse direction automatically.

ref.description: Internal reference `<category>/<entry-slug>` (the YAML filename without extension). Preferred whenever the product is in this database; scripts/validate.ts checks that it resolves.

name.description: Display name. Required when the product is not in the database (no `ref`); otherwise an optional label override.

url.description: External link for products not in the database
